news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, revealed a new development in the Web3-driven payment competition. Bybit Pay will be launched in Vietnam and the Philippines, marking a significant step forward. The initiative is set to commence this month in both countries.
news.headline: Bybit introduces Bybit Pay in Vietnam and the Philippines, bridging Web3 and retail payment in Southeast Asia.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Beijing, it was highlighted that the global community is currently grappling with significant climate issues, including a rise in extreme weather occurrences and an accelerated increase in sea levels. Research indicates that the main contributing factor to these challenges is the excessive presence of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere. Nature-based carbon absorption methods are being explored as a potential solution to mitigate these issues.
news.headline: China Matters' feature discusses the role of Blue Carbon Ecosystems in regulating the climate, emphasizing the impact of excess carbon dioxide on extreme weather events and sea-level rise.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, it was reported that the world economy has faced significant challenges following the initiation of a trade war by the Donald Trump administration a few months ago. The repercussions of Trump's implementation of "reciprocal tariffs" have been severe, leading to disruptions in global trade. The economic turmoil has resulted in a noticeable decrease in international trade volumes, with a significant number of countries experiencing negative growth rates in their GDP. The uncertainty surrounding the trade war has also led to fluctuations in stock markets worldwide, with major indices recording sharp declines. The situation has raised concerns among policymakers and economists about the long-term effects of the ongoing trade dispute.
news.headline: Global economy in turmoil since Trump trade war started. Impacts of "reciprocal tariffs" continue; concerns over instability.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Springview Holdings Ltd (Nasdaq: SPHL), a prominent developer of residential and commercial properties in Singapore, disclosed that its subsidiary, Springview Enterprises Pte. Ltd. has attained bizSAFE Level 4 certification from the Workplace Safety and Health Council on June 9, 2025. This achievement signifies a significant advancement for Springview Singapore as it aims for operational excellence and sustainable expansion.
news.headline: Springview Holdings Ltd achieves bizSAFE Level 4 certification, marking growth in safety and market reach.

news.summary: On June 10, 2025, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) deposited $13,249.65 into its Trust Account, extending the deadline for a business combination by one month to July 13, 2025. The company, a publicly traded special purpose acquisition company, took this step to allow more time for completing a potential merger or acquisition.
news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited invests $13,249.65 to extend business combo deadline by 1 month to July 13, 2025.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 8.6%, marking a significant increase from the previous month's rate of 7.2%. The number of jobless individuals has also surged to 1.4 million, up from 1.1 million in the previous report. This data underscores the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market amid the economic uncertainty caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, it is crucial for policymakers to implement effective strategies to address this issue and support those affected by job losses.
news.headline: Hiive, a pre-IPO marketplace, pursues new funding as competition intensifies in the industry.

news.summary: Two major retail companies, Walmart and Amazon, are said to be considering the use of digital currencies to enhance their online shopping platforms and facilitate international transactions. This move aims to increase efficiency and convenience in e-commerce and improve cross-border sales.
news.headline: Walmart, Amazon exploring stablecoins for easier online transactions. Retail giants aiming to enhance e-commerce efficiency.

These announcements were made in New York on June 13, 2025. The tech sector is bustling with innovations, as demonstrated by the continuous stream of press releases.
news.headline: Weekly recap features 14 tech press releases including CISCO's innovations, SmartLess Mobile launch, & RayNeo's X3 Pro AR glasses.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado on June 13, 2025, Enliven Therapeutics, Inc. (ELVN) launched an underwritten initiative to further its research and development efforts. Enliven is a Nasdaq-listed clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm dedicated to creating small molecule therapeutics.
news.headline: Enliven Therapeutics plans public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants to advance small molecule therapeutics.

news.summary: The 18th International Solar Photovoltaic and Smart Energy Conference & Exhibition (SNEC PV+ 2025) took place at the National Exhibition and Convention Center in Shanghai from June 11th to 13th. The event featured TCL Solar among other exhibitors, showcasing the latest innovations in the solar energy sector.
news.headline: TCL Solar unveils new BC modules at SNEC PV+ 2025, showcasing future solar innovation with tech advancements.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, the 4th China-Africa Economic and Trade Expo commenced in Changsha, Hunan Province, China. The event saw the participation of high-ranking officials such as Ugandan Prime Minister Robinah Nabbanja and Liberian Vice President. This expo aims to strengthen economic ties between China and African nations.
news.headline: 4th China-Africa Expo underway in Hunan, with global attendance. Highlights economic and trade cooperation.

news.summary: A real estate agent, Nichole Story from Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties, successfully assisted a seller in obtaining a significant ROI through interior design and staging services. The property, situated at 517 Poppy Avenue in Newport Beach, was sold for $3.1 million after Story conducted a six-week renovation process. Evaluating factors such as property condition and neighborhood, Story's efforts led to a successful sale, showcasing the impact of her services on property value.
news.headline: Nichole Story helps client sell property at $3.1 million after comprehensive 6-week design process in Newport Beach.

news.summary: In Beverly Hills, California, Kennedy Wilson, a global real estate investment firm, has collaborated with Kenedix, Inc. and Hulic Co., Ltd. to purchase The Danforth in Seattle for a sum of $173 million. This 265-unit multifamily property includes Whole Foods as the exclusive ground-floor lessee. This acquisition further bolsters Kennedy Wilson's substantial portfolio in the Pacific Northwest, which now exceeds 13,000 apartment units comprising both market rate and affordable housing. The company's long-standing presence in Japan, spanning three decades, adds to their achievements in this venture.
news.headline: Kennedy Wilson buys 265-unit Seattle complex for $173 million, adds to its 13,000 multifamily units in NW.

news.summary: In Boston on June 13, 2025, NeuroMaker STEM's NeuroMaker Hand 2.0 and BioSensor Kit won the iF Design Award, a rare recognition for K-12 hardware. This highlights their impact on STEM education.
news.headline: NeuroMaker STEM's NeuroMaker Hand 2.0 and BioSensor Kit won a rare iF Design Award, impacting STEM education.

news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, members of the Ontario Compensation Employees Union (OCEU/CUPE 1750) are gathering for a meeting with Ottawa South MPP John Fraser to address the strike involving 3,600 frontline staff at the Workplace Safety and Insurance Board (WSIB). The purpose of the meeting is to discuss the issues that WSIB workers are encountering, such as stagnant wages, overwhelming workloads, and the transfer of Ontario jobs to external sources. The OCEU representatives are stressing the importance of reaching a fair agreement in the ongoing negotiations.
news.headline: OCEU/CUPE 1750 meets with MPP to discuss ongoing WSIB strike by 3,600 staff for fair deal amid wage stagnation and unsafe workloads.

news.summary: Meta has recently struck a deal that values the data-labeling startup Scale AI at an impressive $29 billion. This move comes as Meta strives to remain competitive against rivals like OpenAI and Google in the tech industry. The substantial valuation of Scale AI indicates the importance Meta is placing on enhancing its capabilities in this field and staying ahead of the curve in terms of innovation.
news.headline: Meta invests $14 billion in Scale AI to enhance superintelligence work, valuing the startup at $29 billion to compete with OpenAI and Google.

news.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has alerted investors in West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) about a class action securities lawsuit. The company is under scrutiny for financial implications, and investors may be entitled to recover losses. This legal action pertains to shareholders who suffered financial setbacks due to alleged misconduct or mismanagement of the Company. Those impacted are encouraged to come forward and potentially reclaim losses experienced in relation to their investments.
news.headline: Investors in West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before July 7, 2025 regarding a class action securities lawsuit.

news.summary: Celebrity-filled gala attended by notable personalities including event chair Beth Stern, Howard Stern, hosts Ginger Zee & Ben Aaron, entertainer Hank Azaria & The EZ Street Band, Rachael Ray & John Cusimano, Ali Wentworth, and more. The event aimed to fund Animal League America's ongoing no-kill initiative. The gala successfully raised a significant amount which will further support the cause.
news.headline: Celebrity-filled gala in NYC honors animal rescue & adoption. Stars like Howard Stern & Rachael Ray attend. Proceeds fund ongoing no-kill efforts.

news.summary: In Kihei, Hawaii, on June 13, 2025, The Remedy Bar™ by Maui Grown Remedies is introducing a novel approach to help individuals navigate the world of cannabinoids. Unlike the maze of contradictory details currently available, this bar offers a straightforward, walk-up discovery experience. No prescription or medical card is needed to explore the products on offer.
news.headline: Maui Grown Remedies introduces The Remedy Bar™ in Kihei, Hawaii, offering a unique hemp discovery bar experience without the need for a prescription or medical card.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Hsinchu, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC. disclosed changes to its operations. The Taiwan Stock Exchange identifiers for the company are 8150, while on Nasdaq, it is listed as IMOS. ChipMOS is renowned for its outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services.
news.headline: ChipMOS adjusts cash dividend distribution ratio to approx NT$1.23 per common share or approx US$0.82 per ADS.

news.summary: Today, in Shanghai, ZKH Group Limited ("ZKH"), a prominent MRO procurement service platform in China listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ZKH, revealed the approval of a new share repurchase initiative by its board of directors. This program aims to...
news.headline: ZKH Group Limited in China launches new share repurchase program on June 13, 2025 (NYSE: ZKH).

news.summary: A substantial investment in American innovation worth millions of dollars has been made to support the peace through strength doctrine and enhance crucial supply chains. Located in San Mateo, California, Skydio, a prominent U.S. drone producer and global pioneer in autonomous flight technology, has received this investment on June 13, 2025.
news.headline: Skydio receives $74M contract to supply drones to State Dept, strengthening US innovation and critical supply chains.

news.summary: By the 24th week, there was a reported cumulative major molecular response (MMR) rate of 47% (25 out of 53). Additionally, 32% (13 out of 41) of patients achieved MMR by the same time point. These results are favorable when compared to previous Phase 1 trials involving approved BCR-ABL1 tyrosine kinase inhibitors. The safety and tolerability profile of ELVN-001 remains positive.
news.headline: Enliven Therapeutics shares Phase 1 data at EHA 2025: MMR rate of 47% (25/53) by 24 weeks, 32% (13/41) achieving MMR.
